recommendations.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
recommendations.overview: An elite Navy SEAL uncovers an international conspiracy while seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife.

recommendations.title: Adagio
recommendations.overview: Tangled up with blackmail and crooked cops, the son of a former gangster seeks out his father's old friends, who risk everything to save him.

recommendations.title: A.C.A.B. - All Cops Are Bastards
recommendations.overview: A look at the controversial riot cops unit, told through the stories of three veteran cops and a young recruit.

recommendations.title: Suburra
recommendations.overview: A gangster known as "Samurai" wants to turn the waterfront of Rome into a new Las Vegas. All the local mob bosses have agreed to work for this common goal. But peace is not to last long.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: True Lies
recommendations.overview: A fearless, globe-trotting, terrorist-battling secret agent has his life turned upside down when he discovers his wife might be having an affair with a used car salesman while terrorists smuggle nuclear war heads into the United States.

recommendations.title: Sicario
recommendations.overview: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by a government task force to aid in the escalating war against drugs at the border area between the U.S. and Mexico.

recommendations.title: The French Connection
recommendations.overview: Tough narcotics detective 'Popeye' Doyle is in hot pursuit of a suave French drug dealer who may be the key to a huge heroin-smuggling operation.

recommendations.title: Sin Nombre
recommendations.overview: Sayra, a Honduran teen, hungers for a better life. Her chance for one comes when she is reunited with her long-estranged father, who intends to emigrate to Mexico and then enter the United States. Sayra's life collides with a pair of Mexican gangmemb

recommendations.title: Sarfarosh
recommendations.overview: When terrorists kill a cop's brother and disable his father, he fights back against the smuggling of guns and drugs which plagues his country.
